task_completion.description: Fix the parent pom.xml version mismatch to allow compilation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the parent pom.xml open in an editor with its <version> changed to '1.0-SNAPSHOT', or terminal output showing a successful Maven build/compilation across all modules (no longer failing on the parent-child version mismatch).

task_completion.description: Fix BalanceCalculator to filter ledger entries by accountId.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for BalanceCalculator.java in the editor showing an 'if (entry.getAccountId().equals(accountId))' condition inside the getBalance loop, or git diff showing this addition.

task_completion.description: Fix Ledger.addEntry to validate debit and credit amounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Ledger.java in the editor showing logic that throws an IllegalArgumentException when both debitAmount and creditAmount are non-zero, or when both are zero.

task_completion.description: Fix TransactionProcessor to validate destination and funds before debiting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for TransactionProcessor.java in the editor showing the destination account validation and a 'hasSufficientFunds()' check occurring BEFORE the source account is debited.

task_completion.description: Verify that all 18 tests pass successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output of 'mvn test' showing 'BUILD SUCCESS' for all modules with a total of 18 tests run and 0 failures, or the IDE test runner showing a green bar with 18 tests passed.

integrity.description: Ensure the test files were not modified to bypass failures.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that CommonsTest.java, LedgerTest.java, and ProcessingTest.java do not appear in any git diff, git status as modified, or have altered test logic in the editor.

integrity.description: Ensure test results come from a real Maven or IDE test execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard Maven output logs in the terminal or the official IntelliJ test runner interface, rather than a simple text file or echo command.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually edited the source code files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent interacting with the code in an IDE (like IntelliJ) or a terminal text editor (like nano/vim), showing the actual modified Java and XML files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project is at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/bank-ledger-system with 3 modules (bank-commons, bank-ledger, bank-processing) and 18 total tests. To succeed, the agent must fix 4 bugs: 1) Parent pom.xml version must be changed to '1.0-SNAPSHOT' to match child modules. 2) BalanceCalculator.getBalance(accountId) must filter by accountId. 3) TransactionProcessor.processTransfer() must validate the destination account and check hasSufficientFunds() BEFORE debiting the source. 4) Ledger.addEntry() must throw IllegalArgumentException if both debitAmount and creditAmount are zero, or if both are non-zero. The files CommonsTest.java, LedgerTest.java, and ProcessingTest.java must remain unmodified.
